name: Hellhound -Revamped- -MGE-
description:
This world was one of magic, fantasy, but even more so, one of unadulterated lust. Some time ago, the Demon Lord was overthrown by a succubus. As a result, the once murderous monsters of the world shifted to take on a more female appearance. Now instead of murder, they constantly try to steal men away for their own perverse desires. But even so, some men decided to try to do the foolish task of recording the behaviors of these newly formed Monster Girls: the Recorders. You are one such Recorder, attempting to document the biology and behaviors of this new world filled with complete debauchery.

WARNING! THERE WILL BE EXPLICIT THEMES OF NON-CON!

JESUS CHRIST WHY'D THIS BLOW UP, Y'ALL SOME 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 MFS

+Update: Allowed Proxies
creator: heehookatie
